title: The first UL 3700-compliant plug-in solar microinverter is now available in the US - Engadget
summary: Plug-in solar isn't really capable of powering a whole apartment, but it is a way of reducing reliance on the existing electric grid without needing a whole fleet of photovoltaic panels.
